description: Line-by-line ML security team code review of all 14 source files
steps: Review ml_classifier.py for pickle deserialization risks, model poisoning, adversarial evasion
Review features.py for regex bypasses and feature extraction weaknesses
Review dataset.py for training data poisoning vectors
Review egress_proxy.py for bypass conditions and TOCTOU issues
Review network_monitor.py for /proc parsing vulnerabilities and eBPF issues
Review honeypot.py for canary detection evasion
Review sandbox.py for command injection and container escape
Review orchestrator10.py for layer ordering bugs and fail-open conditions
Review rate_limiter.py for race conditions and bypass
Review prompt_injection.py for regex evasion patterns
Review audit/log.py for hash chain correctness and file race conditions
Review audit/wal.py for crash recovery correctness and path traversal
Write structured PASS/FAIL/CONCERN verdict per file with line numbers
acceptance_criteria: Every file reviewed with specific line-number references
verification: Review document is complete and covers all 14 files
findings: 2 CRITICAL (pickle RCE), 5 HIGH, 7 MEDIUM findings. Conditional pass for submission.
